name: Lisinopril
definition: Brand: Prinivil, Zestril

name: MM
definition: Myanmar (country code)

name: MMK
definition: Myanmar Kyat (currency)

name: ID
definition: Identifier

name: site_code
definition: Unique identifier for a specific physical location or branch

name: article_code
definition: Unique identifier for a product or item in the inventory

name: stock_qty
definition: Quantity of items currently held in inventory

name: weighted_cost_price
definition: Average cost of inventory items calculated based on purchase history

name: Total Article Count
definition: The total number of unique pharmaceutical articles registered in the database. | SQL: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM citypharma_articles

name: Active Article Ratio
definition: The percentage of articles currently marked as active (status = 1) relative to the total inventory. | SQL: SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) FROM citypharma_articles

name: Brand Concentration
definition: The number of unique brands available in the catalog. | SQL: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT brand_name) FROM citypharma_articles

name: New Articles Added (Last 30 Days)
definition: The count of new articles added to the system within the last 30 days. | SQL: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM citypharma_articles WHERE created_at >= date('now', '-30 days')

name: Category Distribution
definition: The count of articles grouped by their category. | SQL: SELECT category, COUNT(*) FROM citypharma_articles GROUP BY category

name: Total Inventory Value
definition: The total monetary value of all stock currently on hand, calculated as the sum of stock quantity multiplied by the weighted cost price. | SQL: SELECT SUM(stock_qty * weighted_cost_price) FROM citypharma_balance_stock

name: Total Stock Quantity
definition: The total number of units currently held in inventory across all sites. | SQL: SELECT SUM(stock_qty) FROM citypharma_balance_stock

name: Average Weighted Cost Price
definition: The average cost price per unit across all inventory items. | SQL: SELECT AVG(weighted_cost_price) FROM citypharma_balance_stock

name: Inventory Count by Site
definition: The total quantity of stock held at each individual site. | SQL: SELECT site_code, SUM(stock_qty) as total_qty FROM citypharma_balance_stock GROUP BY site_code

name: Stock Value by Site
definition: The total monetary value of inventory broken down by site. | SQL: SELECT site_code, SUM(stock_qty * weighted_cost_price) as total_value FROM citypharma_balance_stock GROUP BY site_code

name: Unique SKU Count
definition: The total number of unique articles currently tracked in the inventory system. | SQL: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT article_code) FROM citypharma_balance_stock

name: Tablet
definition: Solid oral dose form, compressed powder, swallowed whole or chewed

name: Capsule
definition: Gelatin shell containing powder or liquid, swallowed whole

name: Syrup
definition: Sweetened liquid oral form, common for pediatric or cough preparations

name: Injection
definition: Sterile parenteral form delivered IV/IM/SC, requires Rx and trained staff

name: Drops
definition: Liquid for eye, ear, or nasal application, dose measured in drops

name: Cream
definition: Semi-solid topical, oil-in-water emulsion, applied to skin

name: Ointment
definition: Semi-solid topical, water-in-oil base, more occlusive than cream

name: Inhaler
definition: Pressurized or dry-powder respiratory form, MDI or DPI device

name: Patch
definition: Transdermal adhesive form for sustained absorption (nicotine, fentanyl)

name: Suppository
definition: Solid form for rectal or vaginal insertion, melts at body temperature

name: Expiry < 30 days — pull from shelf
definition: Stock with under 30 days remaining should be pulled, marked-down, or returned to vendor before customer sale

name: Expired stock cannot be sold
definition: Selling expired stock is an audit and legal violation; expired units must be quarantined and destroyed per regulator protocol

name: FEFO ordering
definition: First-Expired-First-Out: dispense the batch with the earliest expiry first, regardless of receipt date

name: Batch isolation on recall
definition: On manufacturer recall, every unit of the batch number must be quarantined within 24h and not dispensed

name: Cold-chain expiry acceleration
definition: Refrigerated items (insulin, vaccines) exposed >2h above 8°C have shortened effective expiry and should be flagged

name: Stock Turnover Ratio
definition: Stock Turnover = COGS / Average Inventory. Higher = faster sell-through. Pharma target typically 6-12x annually

name: GMROII
definition: Gross Margin Return on Inventory Investment = Gross Margin / Average Inventory Cost. Measures profit per dollar of inventory

name: Stockout Rate
definition: Stockout Rate = Stockout Days / Total Days. Target < 2% on A-class SKUs, < 5% overall

name: Slow-Mover Threshold
definition: Slow-mover = SKU with no movement in 60+ days. Triggers markdown, transfer, or return-to-vendor review

name: DOH (Days On Hand)
definition: Days On Hand = Current Inventory / Daily Sales Velocity. Target 30-60 days; > 90 = overstock, < 14 = stockout risk

name: Warfarin + Aspirin interaction
definition: ALERT: Warfarin combined with Aspirin or NSAIDs increases bleeding risk significantly. Requires INR monitoring and prescriber confirmation

name: ACE inhibitor + Potassium interaction
definition: ALERT: ACE inhibitors (Lisinopril, Enalapril) with potassium supplements or K-sparing diuretics → hyperkalemia risk

name: SSRI + MAOI interaction
definition: ALERT: SSRIs (Sertraline, Fluoxetine) with MAOIs → serotonin syndrome risk. Requires 14-day washout between classes

name: Statin + Macrolide interaction
definition: ALERT: Statins with Clarithromycin or Erythromycin → rhabdomyolysis risk via CYP3A4 inhibition

name: Metformin + Iodinated contrast interaction
definition: ALERT: Hold Metformin 48h around iodinated contrast imaging due to lactic acidosis risk in renal impairment

name: NSAID + Antihypertensive interaction
definition: ALERT: NSAIDs reduce efficacy of ACE inhibitors, ARBs, and diuretics, raising blood pressure
